title: Patterning of fragile or non-planar surfaces for cell alignment
abstract: A construct that supports cell attachment and alignment including a) a substrate that is incompatible with photolithography conditions; b) a patterned coating of a metal alkoxide, oxide or mixed oxide-alkoxide thereon; and c) a phosphonic acid covalently attached to b), which phosphonic acid contains functionality adapted for cell binding. Also disclosed are methods for preparing such a construct.
